title: find_numerical_chunks data payload
description: v0.30.0 data-driven numerical-context chunk discovery. Replaces v0.21's hardcoded `NUMERICAL_SIGNS = {ABZ480, ABZ411}` filter with an empirical numerical-sign vocabulary derived from the v0.28 k-means clustering of the v0.23 sign2vec embedding space. The numerical_sign_set is the union of `all_members` across every cluster whose suggested_label is 'numerical' OR whose representative_signs include a pure-digit string. This typically yields ~80-150 signs (vs v0.21's 2). The tool then scans the v0.20 length-20 chunk-hash index and surfaces chunks at or above min_numerical_density (default 0.5). Where v0.21 used a 70%-density DROP filter to suppress numerical noise, v0.30 inverts the polarity: numerical-context chunks ARE the object of interest. Methods-paper §3.13 documents the v0.21 correct-behavior-wrong-rationale finding; v0.30 ships the principled replacement on the v0.28 empirical basis. Wrapped in StructuredEnvelope.

numerical_sign_set.description: The empirically-derived numerical-class sign vocabulary, sorted alphabetically for stability. Computed each call from a fresh clusterSignsByEmbedding({ k }) run so the set tracks the embedding index. Round-15 calibration expects ≥50 signs at default k=12, with ABZ480, ABZ411, ABZ427, ABZ598a, BAHAR₂, and the digit strings '0', '4', '19', '27' all members.

numerical_sign_set_size.description: Cardinality of numerical_sign_set, surfaced separately so callers can gate on size without iterating the array.

chunks.description: Surfaced numerical-context chunks, ranked by host_count desc with numerical_density as tiebreaker (rewards purer numerical templates at equal host count). Capped by top_k.

chunk_hash.description: Canonical trigram-joined hash from the v0.20 chunk-index (length-20 window). Pipe-separated.

chunk_signs.description: Reconstructed sign sequence (whitespace-joined). '…' marks an X-skip gap and is excluded from the density count.

host_count.description: Number of distinct tablets in which the chunk occurs. The v0.20 chunk-index pre-prunes singletons, so the structural floor is 2; the min_hosts option defaults to 5.

numerical_density.description: Fraction of chunk_signs tokens (excluding '…' gaps) that fall in numerical_sign_set. 1.0 = every sign is numerical-class. Default surface threshold is 0.5.

numerical_sign_count.description: Number of chunk_signs tokens in numerical_sign_set. Numerator of numerical_density.

total_signs.description: Number of chunk_signs tokens excluding '…' gap markers. Denominator of numerical_density.

chunks_examined.description: How many chunk-index entries the scan visited before either exhausting the index or hitting an entry below min_hosts (entries are pre-sorted by host count desc, enabling an early-exit scan).

chunks_above_density_threshold.description: How many of the examined chunks scored at or above min_numerical_density. Equals chunks.length when top_k is not the binding constraint.

k_used_for_clustering.description: Effective k passed through to clusterSignsByEmbedding. May differ from the request if outside [2, 50]; the underlying tool clamps and surfaces a warning.
